data.title: Freddy's offers $1 Original Doubles on National Steakburger Day, Feb 24; exclusive deal with app download.
data.description: Get a $1 Freddy's Original Double on Feb. 24 by downloading the Freddy's app. Freddy's Frozen Custard & Steakburgers® in WICHITA, Kan. shared this offer on Feb. 17, 2026. The promotion is part of an annual event for loyal customers.

data.title: XFERALL expands patient transfer platform in Southern California, improving behavioral health patient placement.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, XFERALL, a prominent real-time patient transfer and care coordination platform, revealed the expansion of its technology in Southern California. This move aims to enhance access to quicker and more effective behavioral health patient placement. This expansion is set to impact a significant number of patients in need of immediate care, improving their overall experience and outcomes.

data.title: Ex-FCC Commissioner Geoffrey Starks joins Latham & Watkins in Washington, D.C, bringing regulatory expertise. WASHINGTON, Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: Geoffrey Starks, a seasoned communications regulator, has joined the Washington, D.C. office of a prestigious firm. On February 17, 2026, Latham & Watkins LLP shared the news. Starks, who previously served as a Commissioner at the Federal Communications Commission, brings extensive regulatory and policy expertise to the team.

data.title: UN Global Compact Network USA released 2025 Annual Report highlighting private sector's commitment to responsible business.
data.description: On February 11, 2026, the UN Global Compact Network USA (Network USA) released its Annual Report for 2025, showcasing significant progress and engagement within the private sector. The report illustrates a year of expansion, cooperation, and ongoing dedication to promoting ethical and sustainable business behaviors. Serving as the US branch of the United Nations Global Compact, the organization has demonstrated a strong commitment to fostering responsible business conduct.

data.title: Advance Auto Parts (AAP) beats Q4 earnings with EPS of 86 cents (vs 42 cents est.) and sales of $1.973 billion (vs $1.952 billion est.). FY 2026 adjusted earnings expected at $2.40 to $3.10 per share, with sales forecasted at $8.485 billion to $8.575 billion. CEO Shane O'Kelly credits team's hard work towards a successful 2025.
data.description: Advance Auto Parts Inc. (NYSE: AAP) had a robust fourth quarter performance, surpassing expectations. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of 86 cents, well above the predicted 42 cents. Quarterly sales stood at $1.973 billion, higher than the expected $1.952 billion. For fiscal 2026, Advance Auto anticipates adjusted earnings per share ranging from $2.40 to $3.10, compared to analysts' forecast of $2.66. Sales for the year are projected to be between $8.485 billion and $8.575 billion, falling short of the estimated $8.668 billion. Shane O'Kelly, the president and CEO, expressed satisfaction with the progress made in 2025 and acknowledged the hard work of the team. The foundation laid in 2025 sets the stage for a promising future for the company.

data.title: LangChain's AI coding agent moves up 25 spots on benchmark, reaching Top 5 without model changes. Learn why.
data.description: LangChain's coding agent made significant progress by advancing from the Top 30 to the Top 5 rankings on Terminal Bench 2.0. This remarkable climb was achieved by making adjustments to the harness. The developers can learn valuable insights from this success and potentially implement similar strategies. For more details, continue reading.

data.title: Avenue Z acquires Varfaj, a Shopify partner, forming a full-funnel growth agency for DTC brands in Miami.
data.description: In Miami, Avenue Z, a renowned influence agency focusing on enhancing revenue and reputation for dynamic brands, has revealed its acquisition of Varfaj. Varfaj is a well-regarded Shopify development and optimization partner acknowledged for crafting top-notch commerce experiences. This move bolsters Avenue Z’s comprehensive services and establishes the agency as a key player in the future of commerce: AI-driven, agent-led purchasing encounters. Notable platforms such as OpenAI are setting the stage for this exciting evolution.

data.title: PrimeSource Building Products launched Wolf Outdoor Living™ Portfolio with modern outdoor products.
data.description: PrimeSource Building Products, a leading provider of specialty branded building materials in North America, unveiled cutting-edge railing systems, decking, and exterior finishes tailored for modern outdoor living needs and future construction requirements. The announcement was made in Irving, Texas on February 17, 2026. This innovation is set to revolutionize the industry and cater to the evolving demands of outdoor spaces.

data.title: Demand for high-quality beauty supplies is increasing in New York, fueled by rising consumer expectations for skincare and hair removal. Laser by Aleya notes the trend in professional clinics.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, in Great Neck, N.Y., Laser by Aleya emphasized the increasing consumer demand for premium beauty products in New York, especially in professional aesthetic and wellness clinics. This trend reflects the escalating expectations in skincare and hair removal services, with a noticeable uptick in demand for top-quality beauty supplies. The market in New York is witnessing a surge in interest, indicating a clear need for upscale beauty solutions.

data.title: "Don't skip late-winter home maintenance, can cost $thousands. Mercury Insurance advises steps to avoid unexpected repair costs."
data.description: Mercury Insurance (NYSE/NYSE Texas: MCY) is advising homeowners to perform targeted maintenance to avoid unexpected repair costs. With winter coming to an end, they suggest taking advantage of late winter to address minor maintenance tasks. This proactive approach can help homeowners save money and prevent larger issues down the line.

data.title: SOCi releases 2026 SOCi100 ranking the top 100 enterprise brands in search, social, and AI. SAN DIEGO, Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: In its second annual ranking, SOCi, a prominent provider of agentic workforce solutions for multi-location enterprises, identified the top 100 brands excelling in search, social media, reputation management, and AI-driven discovery. The rankings were revealed in San Diego on Feb. 17, 2026. This acknowledgment emphasizes the key role these brands play across various platforms, showcasing their strong online visibility.

data.title: Yamaha celebrates 20th anniversary of Xeno Artist Model trumpets with a sweepstakes for trumpet players nationwide.
data.description: In a commemorative sweepstakes event, Yamaha is marking 20 years of its iconic Xeno Artist Model trumpets. The celebration will take place nationwide, with trumpet players given the opportunity to participate in the limited-time sweepstakes. The event is set to kick off on February 17, 2026, in Buena Park, California. YSweepstakes participants will have the chance to win special prizes.

data.title: AllTrails partners with WNP to sponsor hiking pages; collaboration announced on Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: AllTrails has announced a sponsorship deal to support hiking and outdoor pages featured on the website of Western National Parks (WNP). This collaboration was unveiled in Tucson, Arizona, on February 17, 2026. AllTrails, a popular app dedicated to outdoor exploration, has joined hands with WNP, an official nonprofit organization that promotes education and philanthropy in the National Park system. This initiative aims to enhance visitors' experience and provide valuable information on hiking and outdoor activities. Stay tuned for more updates on this exciting partnership.

data.title: Magna International's Q4 results exceed expectations: $2.18 EPS, $10.84B sales. Fiscal 2026 forecast: $6.25-$7.25 EPS, $41.9-$43.5B sales.
data.description: Magna International, Inc. (NYSE: MGA) released its fourth-quarter results, surpassing expectations. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $2.18 for Q4, outperforming the estimated $1.79. Quarterly sales were $10.84 billion, up by 2% from the previous year, exceeding the expected $10.495 billion. For fiscal year 2026, Magna International anticipates adjusted earnings between $6.25 to $7.25 per share, higher than the projected $5.99. However, the sales outlook for fiscal 2026 was revised downward to $41.9 billion to $43.5 billion from the previous range of $48.8 billion to $51.2 billion, below the anticipated $42.141 billion. The company foresees limited capital spending, signaling strong Free Cash Flow in the coming period.

data.title: Remitly Global reports EPS of $0.10 on 2026-02-18. Investors focus on guidance more than beats or misses.
data.description: Remitly Global (NASDAQ: RELY) is gearing up to release its latest quarterly earnings report on 2026-02-18. Analysts are forecasting an earnings per share (EPS) of $0.10 for the company. Investors will be looking for Remitly Global to not only exceed this estimate but also provide positive guidance for future growth. It's important to note that stock price movement is often more influenced by guidance rather than beating or missing earnings predictions. In the previous quarter, Remitly Global fell short of its EPS target. For more details, check out the complete story at Benzinga.com.
